title: cranichis schlechteri
intro: Cranichis schlechteri, also known as the Schlechter's Liporchis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cranichis schlechteri include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas or infusions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
